title: Delft, ZH — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Delft, ZH: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Delft is a city in ZH with a population of 109,577. A quaint, historic city renowned for Delftware blue pottery, a top technical university, and a charming canal-lined city centre between The Hague and Rotterdam.

Last updated: July 01, 2026
